mechanics.text:
HISTORY
and pulled much of their military strength out of the Inner Sphere For several months during what was later dubbed the Year of Peace _ leaders of the Clans debated who should be the new ilKhan. In mid 3051, they chose Khan Ulric Kerensky of Clan Wolf t0 Iead renewed assault against the Inner Sphere_ During this Iull; Colonel Jaime Wolf of Wolf's Dragoons had summoned the eaders of the Successor States t0 the world of Outreach; There _ Wolf revealed that he ad his fellow Dragoons were actually Clan warriors and that, believing Clan conquest of the Inner Sphere would not restore the Star League tney were prepared to aid the Inner Sphere against their own people_ The Inner Sphere leaders spent the better part of that year for- mulating combined response t0 the overwhelming Clan threat. Setting aside centuries mistrust; Hanse Davion and Theodore Kurita sealed non-aggression pact between tne Federated Commonwealth ad the Draconis Combine Davion also extract- materia aid from the Free Worlds League by promising its leader, Thomas Marik; that he would devote the considerable resources the New Avalon Institute of Science toward curing Thomas' Joshua leukemia. November of 3051_ the Clans renewed their Invasion January of 3052, Clans Smoke Jaguar and Nova Cat attacked the Combine capital Luthien: In an act of unexpected political courage that sealed the oose alliance between the Federated Commonwealth and the Draconis Combine Hanse Davion sent the Kell Hounds and Wolf's Dragoons help defend his age-old enemy = homeworld. The trust engendered by Davion' action enabled both nations t0 devote all their efforts to fighting the Clans_ Despite the close cooperation between tne Federated Commonwealth and the Draconis Combine the Inner Sphere'5 unity remained largely an illusion_ ComStar had negotiated with the Clans soon after the initia invasion_ and upon the Clans return the Inner Sphere_ the order offered to administrate Clan-conquered worlds_ ComStar'$ leader; Primus Myndo Waterly; intended to use the Clan conquest to bring about the collapse of civilization; ComStar would then step in as humani: ty"$ savior; gaining power over all of human-occupied space_ However, when Waterly discovered that the Clans intended to conquer Terra ComStar" homeworld and the cradle of numan- she abruptly changed her tactics_ At the urging ofher Precentor Martial, Anastasius Focht; Waterly struck deal with the invaders and sent the Com Guards to fight Clan forces on the backwater world 0f Tukayyid_ If the Clans won that battle _ ComStar would give them Terra. If they lost, the Clans would halt their advance for fifteen years_ Unknown t0 the Precentor Martial, Waterly also set secret plans in motion t0 strike at the Clans and the Inner Sphere simultaneously while the battle for Tukayyid raged The Com Guards defeated the Clans on Tukayyid May of 3052, in horrific bloodbath that cost ComStar" forces dearly: While the Com Guards were fighting ad dying on Tukayyid to save the Inner Sphere, Primus Waterly gave the go ahead her agents, They launched Operation Scorpion series of covert attacks on worlds in the Clan Occupation Zones and com
munications sites across the Inner Sphere. Waterly hoped to cripple the Inner Sphere and the Clans through this bold gam- bit, enabling her ComStar loyalists to seize power; The strikes failed; upon Focht s return from Tukayyid, ne deposed Waterly and began massive reform of ComStar:
VICTORY AND CANGE The end of the Clan invasion brought other changes in its wake Hanse Davion died of massive heart altack at the end the war Chancellor Romano Liao tne Capellan Confederation died at the hands of an assassin eaving her son Sun-Tzu on the Celestial Throne. Sun-Tzu immediately began to build power base; allying himself to House Marik through an engagement Tnomas Mank" 5 illegitimate daughter; Isis_ within few short years, Theodore Kurita succeeded his father Takashi as Coordinator of the Draconis Combine Ryan Steiner; perennial thorn in the side of the Federated Commonwealth'$ rulers_ began   agitating independent Isle Skye. ComStar; meanwhile split   into [O factions  OverPrecentor Focht's reforms The reactionary group calling itself Word of Blake_ emigrated to the Free Worlds League planet of Gibson with Thomas Marik's blessing 19 June 3055_ bomb blast at charity  event On Tharkad killed the Federated Commonwealth' S beloved Archon; Melissa  Steiner. Authorities failed to apprenend suspect. Ryan Steiner, riding the Cresi of anti-Davion sentiment he had spent years cultivating accused tne new Archon; Prince Victor Steiner-Davion; of engineering Melissa's death: Ryan's native Isle of Skye; already seething with secessionist fever; erupted in open rebellion Victor '$   sister Katherine lried mediate between her brother and the rebel taction, with Iittle success_ April 3056, Victor' $ aide and Katherine' lover; Galen Cox, fell victim to bomb attack in a Solaris notel that narrow missed Katherine Four days Iater; an unknown assassin shot Ryan Steiner dead. Suspicion centered on Sven Newmark, expatriate Rasalhagian who served as Ryan $ aide Many peo however; suspected that Victor ordered Ryan" death t0 silence his allegations about Archon Melissa Steiner effort t0 defuse the Lyran hostilities Victor declared the Lyran world of Tharkad and the Davion world New Avalon co-capi- tals. He then shifted his government to New Avalon ad left Tnarkad Katherine' hands_ naming nis sister as his official regent. This move coupled with Ryan'$ death. quelled the rebel- lion but the briet peace would not Iast. Victor arrived New Avalon to the disturbing news that Joshua Marik was dying leukemia: despite the best efforts of the NAIS to save him The Federated Commonwealth still des perately needed war materiel that only the Free Worlds League could provide _ Victor could not afford t0 lose the only hold he had over Thomas Marik: After consulting with his senior advis: ers_ Victor replaced the dying child with double_ Marik_ how- ever, had suspicions_ generation ago_ the Capellan Confederation had nearly succeeded replacing Hanse Davion with double; ensure the survival of his nation, Marik belleved_ Victor Davion might attempt the same trick_ Marik tOOk
